LAW AND MOTION 302, DEC-31-2024 RE: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES AS TO PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT. THE SUBJECT MATTER IS DISCUSSED. COUNSEL OFFERS ADVOCACY TO CONTINUE THE SUBJECT MOTION. THE COURT AGREES TO CONTINUE THE SUBJECT MATTER. NO OPPOSITION TO THE PRECEDING IS PRESENTED. THE COURT WITHDRAWS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND THE SUBJECT MATTER IS CONTINUED TO LAW & MOTION ON JAN-14-2025 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-14-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ACRO-SPORT GYMNASTICS & SPORTS ACROBATICS CENTER, DBA ACROSPORTS, ALICIA HOFFMAN, AND DORRIE HUNTINGTON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES AS TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AND THEIR ALTERNATE MOTION IS DENIED AS THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE/GROSS NEGLIGENCE AND GRANTED AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS ACRO-SPORTS AND HUNTINGTON AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT HIRING, SUPERVISION, AND RETENTION (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING). COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING WITH A COVER LETTER OUTLINING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 . JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; COURT REPORTER: JAIME PLY, CSR# 13323 (TEL: 714-316-3757 / EMAIL: JPLYCSR@AOL.COM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues As To Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. ROBERT ABEL, Esq. of Law Offices of Robert B. Abel, Jr. (tel: 415-461-5400) for Plaintiff.
Atty. MICHAEL SMITH, Esq. of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara LLP (tel: 510-540-4881) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS ACRO-SPORT GYMNASTICS & SPORTS ACROBATICS CENTER, DBA ACROSPORTS, ALICIA HOFFMAN, AND DORRIE HUNTINGTON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues As To Plaintiff's Complaint.

Matter discussed. Counsel Michael Smith requests clarification as to the tentative ruling. The Court provides further clarification to counsel Michael Smith. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling:

Defendants' motion for summary judgment is denied and their alternate motion is denied as the first cause of action for negligence/gross negligence and granted as to both defendants Acro-Sports and Huntington as to the second cause of action for negligent hiring, supervision, and retention (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling with a cover letter outlining compliance with CRC 3.1312 .

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Jaime Ply, CSR# 13323 (tel: 714-316-3757 / email: jplycsr@aol.com)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues As To Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANTS ACRO-SPORT GYMNASTICS & SPORTS ACROBATICS CENTER, , DBA ACROSPORTS, ALICIA HOFFMAN, DORRIE HUNTINGTON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues As To Plaintiffs Complaint.

Appearances (in person):

Robert Abel Jr., Esq., Law office of, (415) 461-5400, for Plaintiff.

Michael J. Smith, Esq., of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'meara LLP, (510) 540-4881, for Defendants.

The subject matter is discussed. Counsel offers advocacy to continue the subject motion. The court agrees to continue the subject matter. No opposition to the preceding is presented. The court withdraws its tentative ruling and the subject matter is continued to Law & Motion on Jan-14-2025 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Court Reporter: Jaime Ply, CSR: 13323; T: 714.316.3757; E: jplycsr@aol.com. (302/CEK)
